overview: A Student Information Management System (SIMS) built on the Internet Computer. Students can register, log in via Internet Identity, and manage their profiles. Admins can view, search, edit, and delete student records from a dedicated admin panel.
features: Student registration with PRN, name, email, mobile, address fields and full input validation
Internet Identity login for students with protected dashboard
Admin login with email/password and session management
Admin panel with paginated student list
Real-time search and filter by PRN or name
Edit and delete student records with confirmation
Clean, beginner-friendly UI with Tailwind CSS
